data.content:
Implementation plan:
1. Restore the prior launcher behavior by removing `open_browser` calls from `start_cmd` in `scripts/install.sh`, which also makes `foolery restart` stop opening a browser because it delegates to `start_cmd`.
2. Keep `open_cmd` unchanged so `foolery open` remains the explicit browser-opening path.
3. Update the `start` help text to match the restored behavior.
4. Run `bun install --frozen-lockfile`, then `bun run lint`, `bunx tsc --noEmit`, `bun run test`, and `bun run build` from the dedicated worktree.

Complexity: low.
Risk: low; the change is isolated to launcher shell logic, with the main risk being accidental regression of explicit `open` behavior or mismatched help text.
